description_long: This refrigerator features a modern, boxy design with a metallic silver front and dark gray sides and back. The front is equipped with two large, curved handles for the upper and lower compartments, and a vertical handle for the main door. There is a digital display panel on the upper right section of the door, alongside a water and ice dispenser. The lower half consists of two spacious pull-out drawers, likely for freezer or fresh food storage. The back of the unit is plain, with a visible vent grille for cooling and air circulation. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban kitchens or garages.
description: A modern, metallic refrigerator with a digital display, water dispenser, and two large pull-out drawers, featuring a sleek silver front and dark gray sides.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the digital display, water dispenser, and both curved handles for the drawers.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the digital display, water dispenser, and the curvature of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the plain dark gray back and a vertical vent grille.
description_view_3: Rear-right view showing the solid dark gray back with minimal detailing.
attribute_door_handle_style: Curved, protruding handles on the drawers and a vertical, protruding handle on the main door, all in a metallic finish.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Vertical rectangular vent grille with horizontal slats located on the lower back side.
